[event:690258cea8269b9a] When we split something into [vocab]equal parts[/vocab] we make all the parts the same size [event:68fa75d430d5b79d]. That's important for what we're learning about fractions. To make

[event:68fa77a2954a9e89]When mathematicians divide something into [event:695fe4d212927d6c] [vocab]equal parts[/vocab] like you just did, they call it [event:690516c0085fdbe7][vocab]PARTITIONING[/vocab].[event:68fa78c6f3b9c188]  You [vocab]partitioned[/vocab] the bar into two [vocab]equal parts[/vocab]. [vocab]Partition[/vocab] is our special math word for dividing one whole into equal-sized sections.
